title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
steps: Boil spaghetti according to package instructions
Mix eggs and cheese in a bowl
Combine spaghetti with bacon and egg mixture

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices
Grill or bake chicken until cooked
Prepare sauce with tomato puree, cream, and spices
Add cooked chicken to sauce and simmer

title: Veggie Salad
summary: Fresh and healthy salad with seasonal vegetables.
